headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 7, 2026**
article:
The Tampa Bay Rays secured a shutout victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Shane McClanahan earning the win after 5.2 innings of scoreless baseball. Ian Seymour closed out the game with a save. The Milwaukee Brewers also secured a win, defeating the St. Louis Cardinals 6-2 behind Andrew Vaughn's 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs. The Los Angeles Dodgers dominated the Houston Astros 12-2, with Andy Pages leading the charge at the plate, hitting three home runs and driving in six runs.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries, including Chicago Cubs left-handed pitcher Matthew Boyd, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left meniscus injury. The Cincinnati Reds have also been affected, with Emilio Pagán and Brandon Williamson both dealing with injuries. The Houston Astros have placed Carlos Correa on the 10-day injured list due to a left ankle tendon injury, while the San Diego Padres have placed Jake Cronenworth on the 7-day injured list with concussion symptoms.

The Tampa Bay Rays made a roster move ahead of Friday's game, trading right-handed pitcher Yoendrys Gómez to the Minnesota Twins for cash. The Chicago White Sox acquired right-handed pitcher Trevor Richards from the Philadelphia Phillies in a trade for cash. The Atlanta Braves traded catcher Jonah Heim to the Athletics for cash, while the Washington Nationals traded third baseman Zack Short to the Detroit Tigers for cash.

top_news.title: **Rays Shut Out Blue Jays 3-0**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a shutout victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Shane McClanahan earning the win after 5.2 innings of scoreless baseball. Ian Seymour closed out the game with a save.

top_news.title: **Brewers Take Down Cardinals 6-2**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers secured a 6-2 victory over the St. Louis Cardinals, with Andrew Vaughn leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs. Aaron Ashby earned the win for the Brewers.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Blast Astros 12-2 in Dominant Victory**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers secured a convincing 12-2 win over the Houston Astros, with Andy Pages leading the charge at the plate. Pages hit three home runs, including a key homer on a fly ball to left field, and drove in six runs.

top_news.title: **Padres Take Down Giants 5-1**
top_news.summary: The San Diego Padres secured a 5-1 victory over the San Francisco Giants, with Xander Bogaerts leading the offense. Bogaerts hit a home run, his seventh of the season, to drive in two runs.

top_news.title: **Cubs' Matthew Boyd Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Chicago Cubs left-handed pitcher Matthew Boyd has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left meniscus injury, effective retroactive to May 4, 2026.

top_news.title: **Rays Make Roster Move Ahead of Friday's Game**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays traded RHP Yoendrys Gómez to the Minnesota Twins for cash on May 6, 2026.
